title: wire reshape (flat snapshot, status+unknown, ScreenRead) + unix-socket client + simplified Herdr trait + Fake reshape
action: Reshape wire.rs to real herdr: flat Snapshot{agents:Vec<Agent{pane_id,workspace_id,tab_id,kind,status,title}>}, AgentStatus{Working,Blocked,Done,Idle,Unknown}, ScreenRead{text,revision}. New socket.rs: unix-socket client to herdr.sock, newline-JSON request(id,method,params)->response, id correlation, typed error (errors carry no id per PBI-001). Simplify trait in mod.rs to `Herdr { snapshot, ping, read_pane(pane_id)->ScreenRead, send_input(pane_id,text,submit) }` — REMOVE HerdrControl/HerdrStream/FrameStream/ControlSession. Reshape FakeHerdr to new wire (flat snapshot with agents in each status, read_pane returns a screen buffer, send_input appends/echoes).
verify: cargo test --quiet herdr && cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings

trace.outcome: wire.rs reshaped to real herdr (flat Snapshot agents[], AgentStatus+Unknown, ScreenRead); socket.rs unix-socket client (newline-JSON req/resp, one-per-conn, typed errors); Herdr trait simplified (dropped HerdrStream/FrameStream/ControlSession); Fake reshaped to mirror. Committed 334ea15.
trace.verification_evidence: 72 rust unit tests + observe_reply e2e green; clippy -D warnings + fmt clean. wire tests: flat snapshot parse, status Unknown fallback, protocol pin. socket tests: result/error/bad-shape parse, default path.
trace.verify_output: rust unit+e2e green, clippy+fmt clean, web 15 tests+bundle; live-verified vs real herdr (7 agents, real screen, proto 16)
trace.verify_command: cargo test && cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings && cd web && npm run bundle && npm test -- --run
